creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update lang/basic256 to 1.0.0.0

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

It's been tested in redports for i386[1] and amd64[2]
This update removes an unnecessary patch, adds another one and extends a third one.

[1] https://redports.org//~fernape/20131113175501-11515-158973/basic256-1.0.0.0.log

[2] https://redports.org//~fernape/20131113175501-11515-158972/basic256-1.0.0.0.log
